available_topics.title: Machine Learning Regression
available_topics.description: Learn how to build and train regression models using popular machine learning libraries.

available_topics.title: Machine Learning Classification
available_topics.description: Master the art of building and training classification models using popular machine learning libraries.

available_topics.title: Machine Learning Clustering
available_topics.description: Discover how to apply clustering algorithms to group similar data points.

available_topics.title: Deep Learning Fundamentals
available_topics.description: Get started with the basics of deep learning, including neural networks and backpropagation.

available_topics.title: Deep Learning Convolutional Neural Networks
available_topics.description: Learn how to build and train convolutional neural networks for image classification tasks.

available_topics.title: Deep Learning Recurrent Neural Networks
available_topics.description: Master the art of building and training recurrent neural networks for sequence-based tasks.

available_topics.title: Natural Language Processing Text Processing
available_topics.description: Learn how to preprocess and analyze text data for NLP tasks.

available_topics.title: Natural Language Processing Sentiment Analysis
available_topics.description: Discover how to build and train models for sentiment analysis tasks.

available_topics.title: Data Science Fundamentals
available_topics.description: Get started with the basics of data science, including data cleaning and visualization.

available_topics.title: Data Visualization
available_topics.description: Learn how to create effective data visualizations using popular libraries.

available_topics.title: Statistical Learning Theory
available_topics.description: Master the mathematical foundations of machine learning, including PAC-Bayes and VC theory.

raw:
Here is the comprehensive list of available learning topics in JSON format:

```json
{
  "available_topics": [
    {
      "id": "ml_regression",
      "title": "Machine Learning Regression",
      "description": "Learn how to build and train regression models using popular machine learning libraries.",
      "difficulty_levels": ["basic", "intermediate"],
      "estimated_duration": "2-3 weeks",
      "prerequisites": []

      "description": "Master the art of building and training classification models using popular machine learning libraries.",

      "prerequisites": []
    },

      "estimated_duration": "3-5 weeks",
      "prerequisites": ["ml_regression"]
    },
    {
      "id": "dl_fundamentals",
      "title": "Deep Learning Fundamentals",
      "description": "Get started with the basics of deep learning, including neural networks and backpropagation.",
      "difficulty_levels": ["basic", "intermediate"],
      "estimated_duration": "2-3 weeks",
      "prerequisites": []
    },
    {
      "id": "dl_convolutional_neural_networks",

      "description": "Learn how to build and train convolutional neural networks for image classification tasks.",
      "difficulty_levels": ["intermediate", "advanced"],
      "estimated_duration": "3-5 weeks",
      "prerequisites": ["dl_fundamentals"]
    },
    {
      "id": "dl_recurrent_neural_networks",
      "title": "Deep Learning Recurrent Neural Networks",
      "description": "Master the art of building and training recurrent neural networks for sequence-based tasks.",
      "difficulty_levels": ["intermediate", "advanced"],
      "estimated_duration": "3-5 weeks",
      "prerequisites": ["dl_fundamentals"]
    },
    {
      "id": "nlp_text_processing",
      "title": "Natural Language Processing Text Processing",
      "description": "Learn how to preprocess and analyze text data for NLP tasks.",
      "difficulty_levels": ["basic", "intermediate"],
      "estimated_duration": "2-3 weeks",
      "prerequisites": []
    },
    {
      "id": "nlp_sentiment_analysis",
      "title": "Natural Language Processing Sentiment Analysis",
      "description": "Discover how to build and train models for sentiment analysis tasks.",
      "difficulty_levels": ["intermediate", "advanced"],

      "prerequisites": ["nlp_text_processing"]
    },
    {
      "id": "data_science_fundamentals",
      "title": "Data Science Fundamentals",
      "description": "Get started with the basics of data science, including data cleaning and visualization.",

      "prerequisites": []

    {
      "id": "data_visualization",

    {
```

Note that this list is not exhaustive, but it covers many important topics in machine learning, deep learning, AI, data science, and general education.
